headline: Stellantis, Wayve and Uber team up to develop global robotaxi services
summary: The three-way agreement brings together Stellantis' vehicle manufacturing capabilities, Wayve's AI-based autonomous driving software, and Uber's mobility network.

headline: Turkish competition board approves Uber acquisition of Getir delivery business
summary: The Turkish Competition ‌Board said on Friday ‌it had approved Uber ​Technologies Inc.'s acquisition of the delivery arm of Turkey's Getir from ‌Emirati controlling ⁠shareholder Mubadala.  "The commitment by Uber Technologies ⁠Inc. to invest a total of ​US$500 million ​in ​Turkey is expected ‌to support high-quality employment, strengthen local engineering capabilities, and positively contribute to the development ‌of Turkey's digital ​and technology ​infrastructure," ​the competition board ‌said.  Uber said in ​February ​it had agreed to acquire Getir's delivery ​arm, ‌expanding the U.S.-based company's ​Turkish footprint.
